examples: Hexahydroxy N-containing heterocyclic compound without sulfur and phosphorus was synthesized and its structure was characterized.
In synthesis method, the non-phytic acids such as hexahydroxy-benzene and starch are passed through chemical reactions to produce phytic acid.
Melamine, urea and formaldehyde underwent hydroxymethylation and etherification to yield a composed resin glue of methyl-etherified hexahydroxy methylmelamine and methyl-etherified hydroxymethylurea.
